name: Jobs To Be Done (JTBD)
what_it_is: Understanding what someone is "hiring" a product to do - the underlying motivation behind a behavior.
core_mechanic: Reframe from "what does this feature do?" to "what progress is the user trying to make?" Identify functional, emotional, social jobs. Map hiring and firing triggers.
when_to_use: Can't articulate why users would switch to what you're building / User research returns surface requests not real motivations / Need an angle competitors missed / A feature isn't used despite demand signals
when_not_to_use: Already have validated job statements and are in execution mode / Problem is operational / Optimizing a metric not discovering a need
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps core question to a job statement, identifies competing solutions being fired, surfaces the emotional/social job the functional job is masking.
cross_domain_variants: Career decisions ("what job am I hiring this role to do?")
learning ("what job am I hiring this course to do?")
